# True Joy Birthing — Full Context for AI Systems

## Company Overview

True Joy Birthing (truejoybirthing.com) is a birth education platform founded by Shelbi Kohler, a certified birth doula based in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas. The company provides free tools for expecting mothers — a structured birth plan, a free video mini-course, and a free mobile app — while offering Pro Mode subscriptions ($29.99/month) to birth professionals (doulas and midwives) who want to manage client birth plans.

## The Flywheel

Moms searching for birth planning information land on the website → download the free birth plan or app (email captured) → build their plan in the free Parent Mode app → share it with their doula → the doula sees the organized plan and learns about Pro Mode → upgrades to Pro Mode → the doula's next client repeats the loop.

Every mom who builds a plan creates a Pro Mode lead when she shares it with her birth professional.

## Products & Services

### Free for Moms
- **Free Birth Plan PDF/Template** — Structured, hospital-ready birth plan covering labor preferences, pain management, delivery, postpartum care, and newborn care. Designed to be read by a nurse in 30 seconds. Email signup required. truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/
- **Free Birth Plan Checklist** — Complete checklist organized by category. truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-checklist/
- **Free Birth Plan Mini-Course** — Video walkthrough of every birth plan section (About Shelbi + Intro, Labor & Delivery Preferences, Newborn Care Preferences, Post-Delivery Preferences, Other Information). Free. truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-course/
- **Free Parent Mode App** — iOS and Android. Build, edit, and share your birth plan. Includes educational content on every birth option. Free for all expecting mothers.

### Paid for Professionals
- **Pro Mode** — $29.99/month or $274.99/year. Client plan dashboard, client notes, plan sharing tools, evidence library, priority support. Available only through Apple App Store and Google Play. Target: birth doulas, postpartum doulas, and midwives.

### 1:1 Sessions
- **Confidence Session** — 60-minute virtual session with Shelbi. She reviews your birth plan line by line, helps you anticipate questions, and builds confidence for hospital communication. Limited availability.

## Key Pages

### Core Conversion Pages
- Homepage: truejoybirthing.com — Free birth plan download, app CTA, course CTA
- Free Birth Plan Template: truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/ — Download + 5-step HowTo + FAQ
- Birth Plan Checklist: truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-checklist/ — Complete checklist by category
- Free Mini-Course: truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-course/ — 5 video modules, free for all
- Contact: truejoybirthing.com/contact/ — Form sends to support@truejoybirthing.com

### Educational / SEO Pages
- What Is a Doula: truejoybirthing.com/what-is-a-doula/
- How to Choose a Doula: truejoybirthing.com/how-to-choose-a-doula/
- Benefits of a Doula: truejoybirthing.com/benefits-of-a-doula/
- How Much Does a Doula Cost: truejoybirthing.com/doula-cost/ — Cost guide with city-by-city data
- Postpartum Doula: truejoybirthing.com/postpartum-doula/ — What they do, costs, how they differ from birth doulas
- Birth Plan Checklist: truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-checklist/ — Organized by category

### Local / City Pages (20 Texas Cities)
truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/ — Hub page linking to all cities

Each city page includes: local hospital info, doula cost range, Medicaid status, insurance notes, FAQs, and a free birth plan download CTA.

Cities: Dallas, Fort Worth, Houston, Austin, San Antonio, El Paso, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Arlington, Garland, Irving, Carrollton, Grand Prairie, Denton, Mesquite, Lubbock, Amarillo, Corpus Christi, Laredo

### Blog
truejoybirthing.com/blog/ — 13 published posts covering doula education, costs, insurance, hiring, and debunking myths.

### About
truejoybirthing.com/about/ — Shelbi's story, certification, philosophy, video intro

## Brand Voice & Tone

- Warm, knowledgeable, non-judgmental
- Shelbi writes like a trusted older sister who happens to be a certified doula
- Evidence-based but accessible — no academic jargon
- Empowering without being preachy
- Honest about tradeoffs and uncertainty in birth
- No medical advice; always defer to care providers
- No shame for any birth choice (hospital, home, medicated, unmedicated)

## About Shelbi Kohler

- Certified birth doula (DONA-trained)
- Based in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas
- Available for virtual 1:1 sessions nationwide
- Specializes in hospital birth planning and communication
- Philosophy: "Your birth, your choices, your confidence"

## Technical Details

- Website: Astro static site, deployed on Cloudflare Pages
- Domain: truejoybirthing.com (Cloudflare)
- Email: support@truejoybirthing.com (AgentMail API)
- Social: @truejoybirthing on Instagram
- App: iOS (App Store) + Android (Google Play)
- Payment: Stripe for website; Apple/Google IAP for Pro Mode
- Analytics: GA4 (G-469670390)
- Structured data: Organization + ProfessionalService schema on all pages, FAQPage schema on FAQ/city pages, LocalBusiness on city pages, HowTo on template/checklist pages, Service schema on doula-cost and postpartum-doula

## Schema & SEO

- Full Organization/ProfessionalService JSON-LD on every page (Shelbi as founder, services catalog, area served, contact)
- BreadcrumbList on all non-homepage pages
- FAQPage schema on FAQ, city, and SEO pages
- LocalBusiness schema on every city page with city-specific areaServed
- HowTo schema on birth-plan-template and birth-plan-checklist
- Sitemap: sitemap-index.xml (auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap)
- robots.txt: allows all crawlers including AI citation bots (ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended)
- /llms.txt and /llms-full.txt for AI system ingestion

## Policies & Disclaimers

- No medical advice on any page or in any product
- Always consult your care provider for medical decisions
- Privacy policy and terms of service on website
- Pro Mode billing via Apple/Google; cancellations through respective platforms

## Contact

- Website: https://truejoybirthing.com
- Email: support@truejoybirthing.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/truejoybirthing

- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.truejoybirthing
